privileged_info_summary: The task involves attaching synthetic PDF files to four real academic papers in a Zotero library. The papers are: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017) - published at NeurIPS; (2) 'Deep Learning' (LeCun, Bengio, Hinton, 2015) - published in Nature; (3) 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky, Sutskever, Hinton, 2012) - published at NeurIPS; (4) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He, Zhang, Ren, Sun, 2016) - published at CVPR 2016. The PDF files are synthetically generated using ImageMagick's convert command during task setup, not actual published papers. All metadata claims regarding paper titles and primary authors are verified as correct.
